name: llm-interface-chat
description: Single-dyno React and Express chat interface for MiMo-compatible LLM APIs.

TAVILY_API_KEY.description: Optional Tavily API key for current web search.

TAVILY_ENABLED.description: Enable Tavily web search when TAVILY_API_KEY is configured.

FIRECRAWL_API_KEY.description: Optional Firecrawl API key for URL scraping.

FIRECRAWL_ENABLED.description: Enable Firecrawl scraping when FIRECRAWL_API_KEY is configured.
